title: rubus creticus
intro: Rubus creticus, also known as the Cretan bramble, is a species of bramble native to the Mediterranean region, specifically in Greece and Crete. This plant is rich in flavonoids and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus creticus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Rubus creticus is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its extracts can also be used in topical creams and ointments for skin and wound healing.
